nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher（Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher，学名 Cyornis camarinensis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: Caramoan National Park
nodes.summary: Caramoan National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bulusan Volcano Natural Park
nodes.summary: Bulusan Volcano Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Cream-breasted fruit dove、Philippine trogon等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Prior to 2025, this species was listed as a vulnerable species. It is found in the protected areas in Bulusan Volcano Natural Park, Caramoan National Park and Mount Isarog but actual protection from deforestation is lax

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Prior to 2025, this species was listed as a vulnerable species. It is found in the protected areas in Bulusan Volcano Natural Park, Caramoan National Park and Mount Isarog but actual protection from deforestation is lax

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population is believed to be declining with populations estimated between 2,500 and 10,000 mature individuals with populations believe to be declining due to ongoing habitat destruction
